rationale.R1.1: 'Make stronger' centrally requires sharpening the thesis and contribution claim—the gap statement and what ChainSync actually contributes need crisper articulation to be persuasive.
rationale.R1.2: The argument has logical seams (the leap from evaluation numbers to 'deployment-ready' is asserted, not demonstrated); tightening premise-to-conclusion flow is a core part of strengthening the text.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact foregrounds two explicit 'first' claims; strengthening the piece requires those novelty assertions to be better calibrated and defended against nearest prior work, making R1.4 clearly active.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing for any 'make stronger' request on prose—sentence-level clarity, register, and rhetorical force are the primary levers for impact in an abstract/intro.
